word: H8295 - שָׂרַט - sâraṭ - saw-rat' - Cut in pieces

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂרט

Transliteration: śâraṭ

Phonetic: saw-rat'

BDB Definition:

  1. to incise, scratch, tattoo, cut
    1. (Qal) to make incision
    2. (Niphal) to be scratched or lacerated, be cut

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2289

Part(s) of speech: Verb
